name: Shoo-Fly Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir baking soda into molasses until foamy.
2. Add water, salt, and ginger to the molasses mixture. Set aside.
3. Mix flour and brown sugar with lard and butter, then add cinnamon. Stir until crumbly.
4. Line a 9-inch pie plate with pastry.
5. Pour 1/3 of the molasses mixture into the pie crust.
6. Sprinkle 1/3 of the crumb mixture over the molasses layer.
7. Continue alternating layers with crumbs as the top layer.
8. Bake at 375 degrees F for 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown on top.
